steps: This is a rules-fact question, so use dnd-lookup to confirm the Ranger's spellcasting against the catalog.

Correcting the misconception: in D&D 2024 a level-1 Ranger DOES get spells. Unlike the 2014 rules (where Ranger spellcasting started at level 2), the 2024 Ranger has the Spellcasting feature at level 1 — 2 prepared spells and two 1st-level spell slots, using Wisdom.
In addition, the level-1 Favored Enemy feature gives the Ranger Hunter's Mark as an always-prepared spell. So a level-1 Ranger is a spellcaster.
